meaning: 1. inch (unit of length equal to 2.54 cm.)
sentence: 这块屏幕是十五英寸的。
pinyin: Zhè kuài píngmù shì shíwǔ yīngcùn de.

sentence: 最新民调显示他的支持率下降了。
pinyin: Zuìxīn míndiào xiǎnshì tā de zhīchí lǜ xiàjiàng le.
english: The latest poll shows his approval rating has dropped.

sentence: 他花了三年时间整理这批史料。
pinyin: Tā huā le sān nián shí jiān zhěng lǐ zhè pī shǐ liào.
english: He spent three years organizing this collection of historical materials.

sentence: 把蔬菜放入锅中煮五分钟。
pinyin: Bǎ shū cài fàng rù guō zhōng zhǔ wǔ fēn zhōng.
english: Put the vegetables into the pot and cook for five minutes.

meaning: police officer; policeman (general term for any police officer); polic
sentence: 一名警员正在路口指挥交通。
pinyin: Yī míng jǐng yuán zhèng zài lù kǒu zhǐ huī jiāo tōng.
english: A police officer is directing traffic at the intersection.
